title: Classic Scythe
body:
The Reaper's scythe.

The mod adds a scythe inspired in the croparia's scythe.

![Weapon stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7934a5ed350a3821472ce2be91c2ad36bf9f542.png)

The weapon has no crafting recipe and there is no way to obtain it. It is primarily made to be used in modpacks with a custom crafting recipe.
